CREATE TABLE test.visits(CounterID UInt32, StartDate Date, Sign Int8, IsNew UInt8, VisitID UInt64, UserID UInt64, Goals Nested(ID UInt32, Serial UInt32, EventTime DateTime, Price Int64, OrderID String, CurrencyID UInt32)) ENGINE = CollapsingMergeTree(StartDate, intHash32(UserID), (CounterID, StartDate, intHash32(UserID), VisitID), 8192, Sign);
SELECT Goals.ID, Goals.EventTime FROM test.visits WHERE CounterID = 101500 AND length(Goals.ID) < 5 LIMIT 10;
SELECT Goal.ID, Goal.EventTime FROM test.visits ARRAY JOIN Goals AS Goal WHERE CounterID = 101500 AND length(Goals.ID) < 5 LIMIT 10;
SELECT DISTINCT Goals.Serial FROM test.visits WHERE length(Goals.ID) >= 1;
CREATE TABLE test.nested_test (user_id UInt64, attributes Nested (key String, value String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY user_id;
INSERT INTO test.nested_test VALUES (1, (['age', 'city'], ['30', 'New York'])), (2, (['age', 'city', 'country'], ['25', 'Los Angeles', 'USA']));
SELECT user_id, attributes.key, attributes.value FROM test.nested_test ARRAY JOIN attributes AS attributes WHERE attributes.key = 'city' AND attributes.value = 'New York';
SELECT user_id, count(*) FROM test.nested_test ARRAY JOIN attributes AS attributes GROUP BY user_id HAVING count(*) > 0;

SELECT user_id, arrayJoin(attributes.key) AS attribute_key, arrayJoin(attributes.value) AS attribute_value FROM test.nested_test WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM test.nested_test WHERE arrayExists(x -> x = 'age', attributes.key));
